purpose: A public GitHub Pages portal and local AI MIPS Hive tool suite for face recognition, bee-swarm simulation, board review, mechanics demos, and communication-system research concepts.

recommendedInstaller.name: bee_face_full_local_suite_installer.zip
recommendedInstaller.notes: Installs the local Hive service, local browser tools, launch scripts, 3D models, detector payloads, simulation pages, and concept modules as one synchronized package.

modules.name: GitHub Pages portal
modules.description: Online landing page, simple demo explanation, integrated project view, installer links, and local-bridge launch buttons.

modules.name: Colab face detector
modules.description: CUDA/Colab detector runtime for image upload, GPU or CPU inference mode, face embedding comparison, and JSON results.

modules.name: AI MIPS Hive Service
modules.description: Local Hive interface with processor hex map, detector controls, local bridge approval flow, and integration links to the local tools.

modules.name: Token-gated local bridge
modules.description: A localhost-only bridge that requires an approved session before the public page can open local applications.

modules.name: Swarm simulation
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Control -> Swarm simulation
modules.description: The existing Ursina-based 3D swarm view with three statue references and dynamically added bee processors.

modules.name: Bgame
modules.description: The linked 2D/3D bee game demonstration package built from the Bee_game desktop archive, without background music in the published installer.

modules.name: BeeBoard 3D
modules.description: Local BeeBoard interface and 3D Board Review with GLB, STEP, and KiCad board assets.

modules.name: Physical wings
modules.description: Bee-shell physical wing simulation and calibration view.

modules.name: Mechanic Simulation
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Physical simulator -> Mechanic Simulation
modules.description: Browser CAD-style mechanics simulation for the robo-bee mechanism, using local Three.js assets and packaged CAD resources.

modules.name: EOS blockchain simulation
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> Blockchain Simulation
modules.description: EOS-style smart-contract sandbox with a simulated treasury, registry, job ledger, installer hashes, contract source, and line annotations.

modules.name: LI-FI comunication
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> LI-FI comunication
modules.description: Concept branch for optical local bee-to-bee communication through nearby Li-Fi links.

modules.name: neutrino comunication
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> neutrino comunication
modules.description: Concept branch for data transfer from great underground depth where photon/electromagnetic communication is unavailable or impractical.

modules.name: Basic concept
modules.description: Local neutrino concept page connected to the Basic concept hex.

modules.name: Satellite comunication
modules.description: Local satellite/orbital communication simulation used from the neutrino communication branch.

modules.name: Life demonstration
modules.description: Placeholder page reserved for future biological/life-system demonstrations.
